channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Trump Says US Wants "Meaningful Deal" With Iran As Tensions Escalate

media:content.media:description: Trump said the US had already launched strikes and would continue military operations against Iran.

item.description: President Donald Trump on Wednesday said the United States wants a "meaningful" and "effective" deal with Iran amid escalating tensions in the Middle East.
item.content:encoded: President Donald Trump on Wednesday said the United States wants a "meaningful" and "effective" deal with Iran amid escalating tensions in the Middle East.

item.title: Iran Says Hormuz Is "Completely Closed" To All Ships After US Attacks
item.description: Iran's top joint military command announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday, including oil tankers and commercial ships, saying any vessel that will attempt passage will be shot at.
item.content:encoded: Iran's top joint military command announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday, including oil tankers and commercial ships, saying any vessel that will attempt passage will be shot at.

item.title: US Strikes "Multiple Targets" In Iran After Trump's Warning

media:content.media:description: Trump urged Iran to sign a deal to end the war.

item.description: US Says Will Bomb "Key Facilities" In Iran, Hours After Trump Warning
item.content:encoded: US Says Will Bomb "Key Facilities" In Iran, Hours After Trump Warning

item.title: Amid Rising Prices, Trump Says He 'Loves Inflation'

media:content.media:description: "The numbers were great... I love the inflation," Trump told reporters on Wednesday.

item.description: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday brushed off concerns about consumer inflation surging to a fresh three-year high in May, on the back of soaring energy prices caused by his war in Iran.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump on Wednesday brushed off concerns about consumer inflation surging to a fresh three-year high in May, on the back of soaring energy prices caused by his war in Iran.

item.title: "Failing Our Children": Canada Seeks To Ban Social Media For Under-16s

media:content.media:description: A Canadian government official said authorities will try to learn lessons from Australia.

item.description: The legislation covers seven types of harmful content including content that induces children to harm themselves, content that incites violence and foments hatred and non-consensual intimate images.
item.content:encoded: The legislation covers seven types of harmful content including content that induces children to harm themselves, content that incites violence and foments hatred and non-consensual intimate images.

item.title: US Iran War News LIVE: US Carries Out "Self-Defence Strikes" Against Iran In Latest Escalation Of Tensions

media:content.media:description: US Israel Iran War LIVE Updates

item.description: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates:
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates:

item.title: "Great PM, Wise Man": Trump Congratulates PM Modi On Completing 12 Years
item.description: "Great PM, Wise Man": Trump Congratulates PM Modi On Completing 12 Years
item.content:encoded: "Great PM, Wise Man": Trump Congratulates PM Modi On Completing 12 Years

item.title: German Model Missing For Nearly 11 Years Named In Epstein Files: Report

media:content.media:description: Epstein died in custody in 2019 while awaiting trial on sex trafficking charges involving minors.

item.description: A German model missing for almost 11 years is named in the Epstein files, heightening her family's fears about her fate, German news weekly Der Spiegel reported Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: A German model missing for almost 11 years is named in the Epstein files, heightening her family's fears about her fate, German news weekly Der Spiegel reported Wednesday.

item.title: "Never Victimised Anyone, Error In Judgement": Bill Gates On Epstein Links

media:content.media:description: The interview will not be videotaped, unlike several others released by the committee.

item.description: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates on Wednesday said that he "never victimized anyone" as he faced questioning from US lawmakers over his ties to late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.
item.content:encoded: Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates on Wednesday said that he "never victimized anyone" as he faced questioning from US lawmakers over his ties to late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

item.title: "Going To Hit Them Hard Again Today": Trump's Fresh Threat To Iran

media:content.media:description: "We were really close to a deal but they keep tapping us along," Trump said.

item.description: "Going To Hit Them Again Hard Today": Trump's Fresh Threat To Iran
item.content:encoded: "Going To Hit Them Again Hard Today": Trump's Fresh Threat To Iran

item.title: 3 Indians Missing After Attack On Ship Off Oman Coast: Centre
item.description: 3 Indians Missing After Attack On Ship Off Oman Coast: Centre
item.content:encoded: 3 Indians Missing After Attack On Ship Off Oman Coast: Centre

item.title: Video: US Man Tried To Outrun Cops. Was 'Caught' By Alligator Instead

media:content.media:description: The sheriff's office shared an AI-generated image of an alligator receiving a "Deputy of the Year" plaque

item.description: What began as a routine police chase in US' Louisiana ended in a bizarre twist when an alligator joined the pursuit and attacked a suspected drunk driver who had jumped into a swamp while trying to evade arrest.
item.content:encoded: What began as a routine police chase in US' Louisiana ended in a bizarre twist when an alligator joined the pursuit and attacked a suspected drunk driver who had jumped into a swamp while trying to evade arrest.

item.title: $700,000 vs $3.8 Million: Ukraine Builds Its Own Cheap Answer To Patriot

media:content.media:description: The Patriot has long been considered the gold standard of air defence.

item.description: Ukrainian arms manufacturer Fire Point last week carried out the first flight test of a new surface-to-air missile developed as a more affordable, mass-producible alternative to the United States' Patriot system
item.content:encoded: Ukrainian arms manufacturer Fire Point last week carried out the first flight test of a new surface-to-air missile developed as a more affordable, mass-producible alternative to the United States' Patriot system

item.title: Turkey Calls For "Liberating Jerusalem", Netanyahu Slams "Dictator" Erdogan

media:content.media:description: The Turkish President warned that Israel's strikes in Syria and Lebanon had gone too far

item.description: In a post on X, Netanyahu called Erdogan an "antisemitic dictator" and accused him of supporting Hamas, suppressing political opponents and carrying out actions against the Kurds.
item.content:encoded: In a post on X, Netanyahu called Erdogan an "antisemitic dictator" and accused him of supporting Hamas, suppressing political opponents and carrying out actions against the Kurds.

item.title: Ex-Sri Lankan Spy Chief, Easter Bombings 'Mastermind': Who Is Suresh Sallay?

media:content.media:description: Sri Lanka's opposition activists demanding the release of detained ex-spy chief on June 10, 2026.

item.description: Retired Major General Tuan Suresh Sallay was arrested in February for "aiding and abetting" the 2019 Easter suicide bombings.
item.content:encoded: Retired Major General Tuan Suresh Sallay was arrested in February for "aiding and abetting" the 2019 Easter suicide bombings.

item.title: Pakistan Army Helicopter Crashes During Take-Off In PoK, All On Board Dead

media:content.media:description: There has been a heavy security presence in recent days in Muzaffarabad

item.description: Pakistan Army Helicopter Crashes During Take-Off In PoK, All On Board Dead
item.content:encoded: Pakistan Army Helicopter Crashes During Take-Off In PoK, All On Board Dead

item.title: Asim Munir Plays Global Peacemaker Amid Pakistan's Inner Turmoil

media:content.media:description: The most serious threat to Pakistan's military comes from Khyber Pakhtunkhwa

item.description: Insurgency in two of Pakistan's largest provinces, Balochistan and Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, is at its highest level in a decade, according to data aggregated by watchdogs based in India and Pakistan.
item.content:encoded: Insurgency in two of Pakistan's largest provinces, Balochistan and Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, is at its highest level in a decade, according to data aggregated by watchdogs based in India and Pakistan.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Why India Appointed A Non-Muslim Ambassador To Saudi Arabia, For First Time Ever
item.description: It breaks the established convention since 1948 of sending a Muslim ambassador to the country.
item.content:encoded: It breaks the established convention since 1948 of sending a Muslim ambassador to the country.

item.title: OpenAI Says It Has A Plan To Ensure AI Benefits Everyone, Not Just A Few
item.description: In a new blog post, OpenAI says artificial general intelligence should empower billions of people rather than remain concentrated in the hands of a handful of companies or governments.
item.content:encoded: In a new blog post, OpenAI says artificial general intelligence should empower billions of people rather than remain concentrated in the hands of a handful of companies or governments.

item.title: Sri Lanka Says Spy Chief 'Directed' 2019 Easter Bombings That Killed 279

media:content.media:description: Sallay, through his lawyer, has denied any involvement.

item.description: Sri Lanka's public security minister told parliament Wednesday the nation's ex-intelligence chief directed the 2019 Easter Sunday attack, in the first official statement linking him directly to the bombings that killed 279 people.
item.content:encoded: Sri Lanka's public security minister told parliament Wednesday the nation's ex-intelligence chief directed the 2019 Easter Sunday attack, in the first official statement linking him directly to the bombings that killed 279 people.
